name: Kids' Hardside Carry On Spinner Suitcase Dino - Cat & Jack™️
description:
Your kid will be excited to pack their things for vacation with this Dino Hardside Carry-On Spinner Suitcase from Cat & Jack™️. This carry-on spinner suitcase features a water-resistant hardside design with a zipper closure to keep their belongings protected while traveling. Designed with two interior mesh zippered compartments, it also features an internal organizer for effective packing of their clothes, gadgets and more. Plus, the spinner wheels and the retractable metal handle allow for smooth maneuvering, while the side handle makes carrying by hand easy. Featuring allover dinosaur prints in ombre purple, pink and green hues, it's great for any young dino fan.

Cat & Jack™: Designed for all children so you can trust it's made for yours.
